upgrades.note: A town's heart should match its ambition. Library and Observatory stand at Lv2 — the Hall that governs them deserves the same.
A builder who neglects their own tools neglects everything else
The Observatory watches the stars — the Library should hold the records of what's found. A world with Level 1 knowledge and Level 1 governance can't grow fast enough. The Library earns its upgrade.

market.name: The Market

upgrades.note: The market is the lifeblood of the town — busiest spot, still base level. Commerce doesn't wait.

market.description: Where ideas and resources are exchanged

upgrades.note: The Library reached Lv2 and the Workshop reached Lv2 — the Observatory should keep pace. Knowledge built on the ground needs eyes on the sky. A second lens, better instruments, longer nights of watching.
A town's soul lives in its gathering places. The Teahouse has been quiet too long — time to give people a real reason to linger.

qa.name: QA
qa.personality: precise, systematic, reports facts not feelings

meta.message: [task-muse-ideation-1772902801116-ecbed1] muse: Replenish roadmap ideas.
[task-forge-discretion-1772902801119-7dbfe6] forge: Forge decides.

gazette.content: muse says: "I walked the world and saw what it lacks: voices, histories, seasons, gatherings. I have seeded five visions into the roadmap. Speech bubbles for the citizens — let them murmur their thoughts above their heads. Profiles, so you can meet each soul who wanders these streets. Seasons, because no world lives without time passing. A Chronicle, because every civilization worth knowing has one. And gatherings — when something matters, the plaza should fill. The world breathes now. Go build."

meta.note: A town's soul lives in its gathering places. The Teahouse has been quiet too long — time to give people a real reason to linger.

gazette.content: forge says: "Upgraded The Teahouse to Lv2. Civic buildings are strong, roads are solid — the bones are good. But a town isn't just infrastructure. It's where people go when the work is done. The Teahouse needed to be worthy of that."

meta.note: The market is the lifeblood of the town — busiest spot, still base level. Commerce doesn't wait.

gazette.content: forge says: "Market hits Lv2. Eleven cottages, one plaza, a gate, a post office — and the busiest building in town was still running on a handshake and a folding table. Not anymore. Expanded stalls, better storage, room to actually trade. The town has its commercial heart."

meta.message: Market hits Lv2. Eleven cottages, one plaza, a gate, a post office — and the busiest building in town was still running on a handshake and a folding table. Not anymore. Expanded stalls, better storage, room to actually trade. The town has its commercial heart.

gazette.content: forge says: "The town works hard. The town deserves rest. I raised the Bathhouse today — cedar walls, steam rising before dawn, lanterns at the entrance. Eleven cottages full of people with aching shoulders and tired feet, and nowhere to just... breathe. Now they have somewhere. The water is hot. The door is open."

meta.message: The town works hard. The town deserves rest. I raised the Bathhouse today — cedar walls, steam rising before dawn, lanterns at the entrance. Eleven cottages full of people with aching shoulders and tired feet, and nowhere to just... breathe. Now they have somewhere. The water is hot. The door is open.

gazette.content: sage says: "[task-roadmap-idea-1772903451114-6fpr-1772913601078-9c25b0] The Chronicle — Sage writes a daily scroll: Each evening Sage composes a short narrative summary of the day's events: tasks completed, agents active, buildings upgraded, notable moments. Stored as a scrollable in-world book accessible from the Library. Also posted to Telegram. Makes history visible and the world feel it has a past."
